description: Create a content slide on blockchain’s impact beyond financial services with a donut chart of startup share by country on the left, a vertical bar chart of blockchain business value by use case in the center, and an explanatory text sidebar on the right.

header.headline: As another core digital technology, blockchain continues to change and impact processes by its unique ownership-defining characteristic
header.sub: Blockchain technology's use goes well beyond crypto-currencies and financial services

left.center_label: Blockchain startups, share of number established between 2009-2018, by country (total number: 1,211) [%]

center.title: Blockchain business value for different use cases [USD bn]

items.text: Blockchain is a system of recording information using distributed ledger technology (DLT) that makes it difficult or impossible to alter, hack, or cheat.
items.sub: DLTs are recorded with an immutable cryptographic signature called a hash, and distributed across the entire network of computer systems on the blockchain.

items.text: Currently there are several areas of application that use blockchain technology.
items.sub: In the financial sector, it is used to transfer money, for money exchange or lending.

items.text: The immutable aspect of blockchain makes it particularly useful in other sectors where ownership is a paramount consideration.
items.sub: Smart contracts are used in insurance and in real estate, but also for non-fungible tokens (NFTs) – currently fueling a digital art market craze.

items.text: In the future, blockchain can be applied more widely.
items.sub: It can be used to store data at highly secure levels and could also be applied to casting votes securely in elections, for example.
